Reasoning, tool-streaming, cache, and gateway reliability checkpoint.

Highlights:
- Separates reasoning, visible content, and tool-call streaming across Electron, Chat Completions, Responses, Anthropic, and Ollama.
- Hardens post-tool continuation and removes speculative or phantom tool-start emissions.
- Improves Laguna S2.1 reasoning/template behavior and q4 TurboQuant mixed-SWA cache restore, including disk-only partial-prefix reuse.

- Improves single-model gateway swaps, disconnect handling, and process cleanup.
- Adds targeted cache/runtime fixes for LFM, MiniMax M3, Nemotron Omni, Gemma 4 media, Qwen MTP video, and DSV4 long prefill.
